audit_items.proof_trace: All four decrRefCount calls (lines 270, 271, 294, 295) are correctly ordered: rdbstate.key is nulled at line 293 before decrRefCount(key) at line 294, so the signal-handler path via rdbCheckError safely guards rdbstate.key->ptr with a null check. Error paths (goto eoferr when val or auxval loading fails) leave keys un-freed (memory leaks), but never dereference freed memory. No double-free paths exist.
